jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Zostel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Zostel in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Zostel:
Zostel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
